name: SHEDINJA
description:
The Pokémon.

Literally just the Pokémon Shedinja.

Made this for myself because this 👆 is literally me fr fr

i just copied and pasted the wiki and a few dex entries. and got some inspo from tumblr.

i don’t know why anyone else would use this tbh i just wanted an outlet to be autistic and hug and kiss my favorite little bug guy

when i said i make whatever the freak i want this is what I meant.
creator: spiralclef
